titleStmt.title: SII 29.149: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 149. (A.R. No. B. 503 of 1961-62.) SRINGERI, SRINGERI TALUK, CHICKMAGALUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab on the eastern side inside the Mallikārjuna temple.

The record begins with salutations to god Śiva and Vidyā-tīrtha-Vidyā-tīrtha-mahēśvara, and Vidyāraṇya, the pontiffs of Śrigeri maṭha. The inscription records that Venkatappa-nāyaka, Grandson of Sadāśiva-nāyaka of Keḷadi re-established Śṛingeri where Abhinava-Narasiṁhabhāratisvāmi was ruling the Yōga-paṭṭa, and that the latter's disciple Puṭṭappaiyya, son of Gangarasaiyya of Bilge, belonging to viśvamitra-gōtra, bōdhāyan-sūtra and yājus-śākha, renovated the Mallikārjuna temple and made a gift of lands yielding 45 gadyāṇa (annually), after purchase for 300 gadyāṇa for worship and offerings at the temple. The gift was made over to the maṭha for proper management. The record gives details of the types of worship and offerings and the related expenditure.
It is dated Śaka 1543, Durmati, Vaiśākha Śu. 14 [Tuesday] corresponding to 1621 A.D., April 24.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ
cidghanaĒkō vyāpī nityaḥ satatōditō vibhuḥ śāṁtaḥ . jayati jagadēka bījaṁ yasyānugrāhakaḥ śaṁbhuḥ .
yasya niśvasitaṁ vēdāyō vēdēbhyōkhiḷaṁ jagat . nirmamēta mahaṁ vaṁdē vidyātīrtha mahēśvaraṁ . Avi
dyā dhvāṁtasaṁdōha vidāraṇa paṭīyasīṁ . vidyāraṇyagurōḥ śrīmatpādukāṁ praṇamāmyahaṁ . ha
rērlīlāvarāhasya daṁṣṭrādaṁḍaḥ sapātuvaḥ . hēmādri(ḥ) kalaśā yatra dhātrī chatra śrīyaṁ dadhau . na
mastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīvijayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣa 1543 neya vartamāna durmati saṁvatsarada vaiśākha śuddha 10 yallū śrīmat keladiya sadāśiva
nāyakara pautra veṁkaṭappanāyakaru ś®ṁgēriya punapratiṣṭheya māḍi ś®ṁgēriya Abhinava narasiṁha bhāratī svāmigaḷu sthi
rayōga paṭṭavanāḷuva samayadalli svāmigaḷige mukhyapriya śiṣyarāda viśvāmitra gōtrada bōdhāyana
sūtrada yajuḥ śākheya biḷigeya gaṁgarasayyagaḷa makkaḷu puṭṭappa yyagaḷu mallikārjuna dēvasthānavanu jī
rṇnōddhāravanū māḍi Ā dēvatāsēvege śrīmaṭhakke vṛttivaṁtariṁda krayadānavāgi baṁda svāsthiyanu śrīmaṭhakke ga
300 munnūrru varahavanū krayavāgi koṭṭa kālavoṁdakke ga 45 nālvattaidu varaha bāha svāstheyanu tegedukoṁ
ḍu biṭṭa svāstheya vivara kelanāḍa hoṁnaḷe bhāgiyali hulugōḍa saṁ(ṇaṁ)ṇaseṭṭiya makkaḷiṁda saluva tōṭada siddā
ya ga 7 varaha bobbiyanāḍalli kobbilatōṭada sidhyā beṭṭaseṭṭi makkaḷiṁda ga 3 varaha kikkuṁdada keḷabhāgada
lli seṭṭiya haḍila tōṭada siddhāya saṁkaṇanappayyanavariṁda ga 4 varaha bāgōḍu mudda
ṁṇana makkaḷiṁda tōṭada siddhāya ga 1 varaha hūkōḍa ceṁnnammana makkaḷiṁda bāgō
ḍa tōṭada siddhāya ga 2 varaha naḍubhāgiyalli besavūralli saṁkaṇa kṛṣṇappanavaru māḍuva pha
la Aḍakeya mara mūrusāvirada terriniṁda saluvadu ga 18 varaha Aṇagala bayalu Elapa hebāra
na makkaḷu geyiva Aḍakēmara sāvirada Iṁnūra terriniṁda saluvadu ga 5 varaha kelanāḍa haṁga
ḍūranāḍavoḷagaṇa hēmānī siṁgaṁṇaniṁda saluva gaḍībhatta ga 5 varaha Aṁ
tuga 45 varaha Ī nālvattaidu varahakke māḍida dēvatāsēveya vivara Ēkādaśarudrā
bhiṣēkava māḍuva brāhmaṇana jana 1 kke ga 9 varaha tuṁgabhadradudakada koḍa dina 1 kke hannoṁ
du sahabrāṁhaṇana jana 1 kke ga 6 varaha Amṛtapaḍi dina 1 kke Akki vokkaḷakāyi tuppa mē
lōgarake saha ga 6 varaha tāṁbūlake lau 2 haṇa gaṁdha mattu lōbānake ga 9 parimaḷa ga lau 9 hoṁnu Ā
ratiyabatti Eṁṇege saha ga 1 varaha sōmavāra paṁcāmṛtake ga 6 varaha kārtīka pūjege ga 1
varaha pradōśapūjege ga 9 sahasranāma maṁtra puṣpa māḍuva brāhmaṇa jana 1 ke ga 4 varaha Aṁtu
dhanumāsada pūjege ga 90 śivarātrige ga 90 kajjāya paramāṁnake ga 2 varaha naṁ
dādīpti 2 kke ga 5 varaha Aṁtu ga 45 varahana sēveyanu ś®ṁgēriya svāmiga
ḷa manuṣyarē sāṁgavāgi naḍasuva hāge biṁnahaṁ māḍikoṁḍu samarpisida dharmaśāsana .
Ādityacaṁdrāvanilōnalaśca dyaurbhūmirāpō hṛdayaṁ manaśca . Ahaśca rātriśca Ubhēca saṁ
dhyē dharmmaśca jānāti narasya vṛttaṁ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dā
nātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyutē krimiḥ . śrī mallikārjunanē gati śrī
Digital edition of SII 29.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
